channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 51 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: Tehran will keep the strategic Strait of Hormuz closed until Washington ends the blockade of Iranian ports.

item.title: How the Israeli military targets the people who save lives
item.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 57 medical workers in Lebanon since early March. It is a pattern lifted from Gaza.

item.title: Iran, US still ‘far’ from breakthrough amid Strait of Hormuz impasse
item.description: Tehran is 'fully prepared' for the US to resume hostilities at any moment, says Iran's parliament speaker Ghalibaf.

item.title: North Korea launches ballistic missiles towards sea off its east coast
item.description: Multiple ballistic missiles fired from eastern Sinpo area in seventh such test this year.

item.title: Iran war live: Hormuz Strait ‘closed’ as Tehran says no date for US talks
item.description: IRGC says the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed until the US stops blockading Iranian ports.

item.title: Iran reasserts control of Hormuz Strait as Trump warns against ‘blackmail’
item.description: Top negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says US naval blockade of Iran's ports is 'a clumsy and ignorant decision'.

item.title: Manchester United beat Chelsea as Cunha strike boosts Champions League hope
item.description: Manchester United strengthen grip on third spot in Premier League with 1-0 win that leaves Chelsea relying on favours.

item.title: Iran military orders Indian ship to abort Strait of Hormuz passage
item.description: Video shows the moment Iran’s military ordered an Indian ship to abort its passage of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Mazzucato on the Iran war’s economic shock: Who pays the price?
item.description: Redi Tlhabi speaks to economist Mariana Mazzucato on the Iran war's economic fallout and who’s really paying the price.

item.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
item.description: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.
